title: Authors and Citation
text: Kouré (2026). transitmattr: R Client TransitMatters Data Dashboard API. R package version 0.1.0, https://transitmatters.github.io/transitmattr.
code: @Manual{,   title = {transitmattr: R Client for the TransitMatters Data Dashboard API},   author = {Andrew Kouré},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://transitmatters.github.io/transitmattr}, }

what: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
title: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
text: R package TransitMatters Data Dashboard API, providing access MBTA performance metrics: headways, dwell times, travel times, ridership, speed restrictions, .

title: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
text: remotes:

title: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
code: # Check API health tm_healthcheck()  # List MBTA facilities tm_facilities()  # Service ridership dashboard summary tm_service_ridership_dashboard()

title: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
text: Functions accept either Date object "YYYY-MM-DD" string.
code: tm_headways("2024-01-15") tm_dwells(as.Date("2024-01-15")) tm_travel_times("2024-01-15")  # Dated or current alerts tm_alerts() tm_alerts("2024-01-15")

title: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
code: tm_aggregate_travel_times(   from_stop  = "place-pktrm",   to_stop    = "place-davis",   start_date = "2024-01-01",   end_date   = "2024-01-31" )  tm_aggregate_headways(   stop       = "place-davis",   start_date = "2024-01-01",   end_date   = "2024-01-31" )

title: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
code: # Ridership for the Red Line tm_ridership("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31", line_id = "line-red")  # Delay summary by line tm_line_delays("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31", line = "line-red")  # Trip metrics tm_trip_metrics("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31", agg = "daily", line = "line-red")  # Scheduled service (optionally filtered to one route) tm_scheduled_service("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31", agg = "daily") tm_scheduled_service("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31", agg = "daily", route_id = "Red")  # Speed restrictions / slow zones tm_speed_restrictions("line-red", "2024-01-15")  # Service hours tm_service_hours("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31", agg = "daily")

title: transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
transitmattr — R Client for the TransitMatters API
text: MIT

title: Get aggregate dwells — tm_aggregate_dwells
text: Common query parameters include stop, start_date, end_date, direction_id.

title: Get aggregate dwells — tm_aggregate_dwells
text: ... Named query parameters passed API (e.g., from_stop, to_stop, start_date, end_date). base_url Base URL TransitMatters API. Defaults getOption("tm_dashboard_base_url") production host.

title: Get aggregate dwells — tm_aggregate_dwells
text: list aggregated dwell time data.

title: Get aggregate headways — tm_aggregate_headways
text: Common query parameters include stop, start_date, end_date, direction_id.

title: Get aggregate headways — tm_aggregate_headways
text: ... Named query parameters passed API (e.g., from_stop, to_stop, start_date, end_date). base_url Base URL TransitMatters API. Defaults getOption("tm_dashboard_base_url") production host.

title: Get aggregate headways — tm_aggregate_headways
text: list aggregated headway data.

title: Get aggregate travel times — tm_aggregate_travel_times
text: Retrieves aggregated travel time data date range stop pair. Common query parameters include from_stop, to_stop, start_date, end_date.

title: Get aggregate travel times — tm_aggregate_travel_times
text: ... Named query parameters passed API (e.g., from_stop, to_stop, start_date, end_date). base_url Base URL TransitMatters API. Defaults getOption("tm_dashboard_base_url") production host.

text: list data element.

title: Get MBTA service alerts — tm_alerts
text: user_date NULL undated /api/alerts endpoint called, returning current alerts. Pass date retrieve alerts specific day.

title: Get MBTA service alerts — tm_alerts
text: user_date Date object, "YYYY-MM-DD" string, NULL (default) current alerts. base_url Base URL TransitMatters API. Defaults getOption("tm_dashboard_base_url") production host.

title: Get MBTA service alerts — tm_alerts
text: list alerts element.

what: Get delay data by line — tm_line_delays
title: Get delay data by line — tm_line_delays
text: Returns alert-based delay summaries MBTA line date range.

title: Get delay data by line — tm_line_delays
Get delay data by line — tm_line_delays
text: start_date Start date range. Date object "YYYY-MM-DD" string. end_date End date range. Date object "YYYY-MM-DD" string. line MBTA line identifier, e.g. "line-red". base_url Base URL TransitMatters API. Defaults getOption("tm_dashboard_base_url") production host.

title: Get delay data by line — tm_line_delays
text: list line delay records.

title: Get delay data by line — tm_line_delays
Get ridership data — tm_ridership
text: Returns ridership counts date range, optionally filtered single MBTA line.

title: Get ridership data — tm_ridership
code: tm_ridership(start_date, end_date, line_id = NULL, base_url = tm_base_url())

title: Get ridership data — tm_ridership
text: start_date Start date range. Date object "YYYY-MM-DD" string. end_date End date range. Date object "YYYY-MM-DD" string. line_id Optional MBTA line identifier, e.g. "line-red". base_url Base URL TransitMatters API. Defaults getOption("tm_dashboard_base_url") production host.

title: Get ridership data — tm_ridership
text: list ridership records.

title: Get scheduled service data — tm_scheduled_service
text: Returns scheduled service counts aggregated date range. Optionally filtered single route.

title: Get scheduled service data — tm_scheduled_service
code: tm_scheduled_service(   start_date,   end_date,   agg,   route_id = NULL,   base_url = tm_base_url() )

title: Get scheduled service data — tm_scheduled_service
text: start_date Start date range. Date object "YYYY-MM-DD" string. end_date End date range. Date object "YYYY-MM-DD" string. agg Aggregation level, e.g. "daily" "weekly". route_id Optional MBTA route ID filter results. base_url Base URL TransitMatters API. Defaults getOption("tm_dashboard_base_url") production host.

title: Get scheduled service data — tm_scheduled_service
text: list scheduled service records.

title: Get scheduled service data — tm_scheduled_service
